## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content production progress, review artifacts, and address ongoing challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Artifacts need review: GrowthX to share Google Doc versions for Rapyd team to review](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Content tone improved: Recent blog rewrite better reflects Rapyd's voice, though technical accuracy still needs work](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Knowledge gap: Additional internal Rapyd resources needed to improve technical accuracy of content](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Performance improving: Google referrals and LLM engagement showing positive growth trends](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [Mark to review updated Payment Liability Shift blog on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Team to review artifacts shared in Google Docs by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Rapyd team (esp. Mark) overwhelmed with content review load](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Need for additional deep payments experts to assist with technical validation](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

### Content Quality Improvements

  - [Recent blog rewrite (Payment Liability Shift) shows improved tone and voice](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Technical accuracy still an issue, but fixable without full rewrites](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Team discussing how to build better knowledge base for GrowthX writers](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### Internal Rapyd Resources

  - [Marc suggested leveraging Rapyd Talks (internal training platform) content](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Potential to engage Hedy (sales/product expert) or David Riz's team for curated resources](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [MRC (Merchant Risk Council) materials could be valuable](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Google referrals showing significant growth, outperforming previous weeks' combined sources](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [LLM referrals increased from \~5 to 15 sessions, with Perplexity as leading source](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Engaged sessions at \~70%, above 50% benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

### Additional Requests

  - [Mark asked for assessment of Rapyd's site schema optimization for AI](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide best practices and recommendations, with caveats about evolving landscape](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share artifacts in Google Docs for Rapyd team review](https://fathom.video/share/VTgu7jTyVqnTwixd_jNTZw3Qzupu4zCp?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
